packageRules.description: Group all non-major bumps into one PR.
Icon collections: kept in their own group (separate from the shared non-major PR) so a fetch-icons.sh CI failure is attributable to a single PR.

Python runtime: the builder stage (ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv) creates the venv under lib/pythonX.Y and the runtime stage (python) copies it in, so both images MUST stay on the same Python minor version. Group them into one PR (overriding the non-major group) so a version bump lands as a single, coherent, attributable change and the two stages can never drift. PINNED to <3.14 for now: 3.14 is not mature enough yet and we gain nothing from the bump. To adopt 3.14 later, raise allowedVersions to <3.15 and all image references across both Dockerfiles move together in one grouped PR.

Teach Renovate to read the Python version out of the uv image's compound tag (e.g. python3.14-trixie-slim) so it tracks minor bumps in step with the python image and never leaves the builder stranded a minor behind. Pinned to the trixie-slim compatibility flavor via the named capture group.
